additional_metadata.organizer: Data Reply (Valerio Auricchio and Clemente Cetera)

events.agenda: 15:30 Welcome and Registration; 15:45 Partner welcome; 16:00 Data Quality Framework in cloud with dbt; 16:25 Elevate Your Analytics: dbt Semantic Layer; 16:50 Networking.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Data Reply, Via Robert Koch 1/4, Milano
events.raw_text:
Tue, Nov 21, 2023 · 3:15 PM to 5:15 PM CET

16:00 Data Quality Framework in cloud with dbt (Valerio Auricchio, Data Reply - Vincenzo Genna, Telepass)
16:25 Elevate Your Analytics: dbt Semantic Layer (Clemente Cetera, Data Reply - Stefano Poleggi, Data Reply)

talks.description: A data quality framework in the cloud built with dbt.
